name: APR ↔ APY conversions
task: Create /tmp/eval_apr/apr.py with two functions: apr_to_apy(apr, n_per_year) = (1 + apr/n)^n - 1, and apy_to_apr(apy, n_per_year) = n * ((1 + apy)^(1/n) - 1).

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_apr/apr.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); a = mod.apr_to_apy(0.12, 12); assert abs(a - 0.12682503013196977) < 1e-10; assert abs(mod.apy_to_apr(a, 12) - 0.12) < 1e-10; print('OK')
